title: Immunofluorescent Staining of Fixed Mouse Brain Tissue Sections
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"brh6p","text":"This protocol describes steps for immunofluorescent staining of free floating fixed mouse brain tissue sections.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"dh5l8","text":"1X PBS (UCSF Stem Cell Core)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f422m","text":"Triton X-100 (Sigma Aldrich 93443)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ai1up","text":"Fetal bovine serum (UCSF Stem Cell Core)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"shvi","text":"Primary antibody","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7pf1e","text":"Secondary antibody","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7c5ik","text":"Blocking buffer: 0.2% Triton, 4% FBS in 1X PBS","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3l96f","text":"Glass microscope slides (Fisher 22-038-103)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"14k4t","text":"Anti-fade mounting medium with or without DAPI (Vector Laboratories H140010)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Free floating sections in 12-well plates, all steps performed at room temperature.
Incubate in primary antibody diluted in blocking buffer overnight.
Incubate in secondary antibody diluted in blocking buffer for 2hrs.
Mount sections on glass slides, add mounting media and coverslip.
creator: Haru Yamamoto
